data.body:
[Double Drop Campaign Preview]

The amount of rewards dropped in Missions will be doubled.
Don't miss out on this chance to develop your students!

🗓️Mission Normal*2: 8/1(Mon) 19:00 – 8/5 (Fri) 18:59 (UTC)
🗓️Mission Hard*2: 8/5(Fri) 19:00 – 8/8 (Mon) 18:59 (UTC)
